name: @jscrypto/monorepo
description: Composable cryptography components for JavaScript and TypeScript.

scripts.coverage: npm run build && c8 --check-coverage --statements 100 --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --reporter=text --reporter=html --include=packages/core/dist/index.mjs --include=packages/classic/dist/index.mjs node --test tests/*.test.mjs
